description:
Adversarial read of the just-frozen docs/architecture.md (bl-cac0) found one hard contradiction + several overstatements. Filed per the freeze discipline (new design ball + a §15 revision entry, NOT a silent edit).

PRIMARY — HARD CONTRADICTION (fix): §13 prime --install (doc lines ~786-788) still describes the RETIRED config CHAIN: "runs the prime->install pair RECURSIVELY down the config chain — install a layer, re-prime to see the layer it points to, ... until a self-contained config (no further redirect) is reached." The 2026-06-05 config/store split killed exactly this everywhere else (§0/§4/§12: "there is no trail, no terminus, no transitive discovery, no config layering down a chain"; §15: "Chains and transitive auto-discovery go"). A recursive multi-hop install IS the trail renamed. RESOLUTION: prime --install collapses to a SINGLE install (one center, one hop). Update §13 + §15.

SECONDARY — coherence overstatements (decide fix vs document):
- §11 core COMPUTES+PRINTS the delivery plugin worktree path, baking that plugin name + §1 territory layout into core — contradicts §0 ("core knows only a plugin name+binary, never its territory") and §6 ("no privileged plugins"). Reframe: the delivery plugin prints its own path on claim.post (it owns the formula) — needs plugin stdout to reach the user (today "diagnostics only").
- §0 "enforced structurally, not by discipline" vs ~4 BY-DISCIPLINE load-bearing props: landing single-owner (§4), install folder=wipe vs glob=union blast radius (§6), late-subtask-on-claimed-epic close gap (§10 skill-hint), un-undoable-sorts-LAST (§14 "recommendation, not enforced"). Name these as the known soft spots.
- "Landing config is the SOLE authority" (§0/§4) vs §4 layering where XDG config.toml + CLI override the landing (could redirect tasks_branch around the install consent boundary). Precise: "no REMOTE is authoritative; effective = landing(+)XDG(+)CLI."
- §8 "every op is the same shape" undercut by the seal-less sync/prime/doctor carve-out.
- §8 stale line "This sequence is a draft destined for the final docs/" — self-contradictory now; delete.

ACCEPTED TRADEOFFS (probably fine — confirm): 3-state ladder folds awaiting-merge into "claimed" (detail view still shows the gate child); default implicit founding pushes balls/tasks on first prime (opt-out --stealth); close/drop mechanically identical (distinguished by bl-op + hook wiring).
title: Coherence pass on frozen docs/architecture.md: retire trail-survival in §13 prime --install + name soft spots
